assertions.description: AMS1117-3.3 (VBUS→+3V3) detected as LDO. USB-C J3 CC pulldown resistors pass, VBUS ESD fail is real (no TVS). Four 100k/100n RC filters on PWM_R/G/B/PWM_1 correctly classified as low-pass. SK6812 chain=1 in this schematic is correct since remaining LEDs are on the LED board.
VBUS is supplied by USB-C connector J3. GND and VBUS both lack PWR_FLAG symbols. The warnings are accurate and expected for a USB-powered design without explicit PWR_FLAG placement.
